title: nepeta orphanidea
intro: Nepeta orphanidea, also known as Kyllene catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Greece. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nepeta orphanidea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its herbal properties, and it is also used in traditional Greek medicine to treat various ailments.
